name: Xiang Li
background: Mr. Xiang Li is our founder and has served as our chairman of the board of directors and chief executive officer since our inception. Mr. Li is a serial entrepreneur with approximately 20 years of experience in creating and managing internet companies in China. Prior to founding our company, Mr. Li founded autohome.com.cn, or Autohome (NYSE: ATHM), and served as its president from 1999 to June 2015.

commpanies.name: Li Auto Inc.
commpanies.title_or_role: Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Chairman of the Board
